name: IRC_HTTP_REQUESTS
description: This table stores http request information.

columns.Name: HTTP_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: CONSUMER_REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the consumer using the REQUEST

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: Full URL of the request. Can include tokens.

columns.Name: HTTP_METHOD
columns.Comments: HTTP Method of the request, like GET, POST etc.,

columns.Name: AUTH_TYPE
columns.Comments: Authentication type used for the http request.

columns.Name: BASIC_AUTH_KEY
columns.Comments: Key of the Basic Auth used for this http request.

columns.Name: BASIC_AUTH_VALUE
columns.Comments: Value of the Basic Auth used for this http request.

columns.Name: BEARER_TOKEN
columns.Comments: Bearer token used to authenticate this http request.

columns.Name: BODY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the body supported for the http request.

columns.Name: BODY_SUBTYPE
columns.Comments: Sub-type of the body of the http request. This applies only when the TYPE is raw.

columns.Name: BODY
columns.Comments: Body or payload of the http request.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
